output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?work WHERE {
  ?work wdt:P31 wd:Q11428 .
  ?work wdt:P1476 ?title .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?title) , 'i look at the world'))
}
output.answer: No results found. The poem titled 'I Look at the World' does not appear to be registered in Wikidata with the given title. The query returned no matches for literary works with that title.
